no_solution_leakage.reason: instruction.md explicitly states the exact fix patterns: 'error.routeId ??= matchState.routeId as any', the exact function signature 'export function getNotFound(error: unknown)', 'const notFoundError = getNotFound(error)', and 'error.routeId ??= matchData.value?.routeId as any'. solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert exact string patterns like 'error.routeId ??= matchState.routeId' in file content, 'export function getNotFound(' in not-found.tsx, 'const notFoundError = getNotFound(error)' in Match.tsx, and 'routeId ??=' with 'matchData.value' in Vue Match.tsx. tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The fail-to-pass tests (TestReactRouterNotFoundFix, TestSolidRouterNotFoundFix, TestVueRouterNotFoundFix) exclusively use 'assert ... in content' pattern reading file contents as strings. test_not_tautological.reason: A stub implementation that simply writes the expected string patterns into the files would pass all f2p tests.
